desc.zh-CN: JS 的个人项目导航站，以 Agent-first 的方式整理项目、内容与实验。
desc.en-US: JS's personal project hub, organized in an agent-first way for projects, content, and experiments.

jsComment.zh-CN: 这是整个项目宇宙的入口，先看它最容易理解整体方向。
jsComment.en-US: This is the entry point to the whole project universe and the fastest way to understand the bigger picture.

desc.zh-CN: 面向 AI Agent 的浏览器扩展项目，让 Agent 拥有更直接的网页交互能力。
desc.en-US: A browser extension project for AI agents, giving them a more direct way to interact with the web.

jsComment.zh-CN: 如果想看更偏产品化的一面，这个仓库很有代表性。
jsComment.en-US: If you want to see the more productized side of the work, this repo is a strong example.

desc.zh-CN: JavaScript 知识棱镜 CLI 工具，把知识处理做成可组合、可扩展的命令行工作流。
desc.en-US: A JavaScript knowledge prism CLI toolkit that turns knowledge processing into a composable, extensible workflow.

jsComment.zh-CN: 这是知识工具链方向里辨识度很高的一个项目。
jsComment.en-US: This is one of the most distinctive repos in the knowledge-tooling direction.

desc.zh-CN: JS 的个人项目导航站，以 Agent-first 的方式整理项目、内容与实验。
desc.en-US: JS's personal project hub, organized in an agent-first way for projects, content, and experiments.

desc.zh-CN: 围绕 Cursor Agent 工作流的实验项目，聚焦代理协作、提示与执行方式。
desc.en-US: An experimental project around Cursor Agent workflows, focused on agent collaboration, prompting, and execution patterns.

desc.zh-CN: OpenClaw 插件与 CLI 脚手架，用来初始化、配置和维护 JS_HealthGuard 健康代理工作区。
desc.en-US: An OpenClaw plugin and CLI scaffold for initializing, setting up, and maintaining the JS_HealthGuard agent workspace.

desc.zh-CN: 围绕 OpenClaw 的学习、拆解与实践记录，适合从项目理解到动手验证。
desc.en-US: A learning and practice repo around OpenClaw, useful for going from understanding the project to trying it hands-on.

desc.zh-CN: 面向 OpenClaw 的 X.com 账号监控 Skill，用于跟踪账号动态与关键信号。
desc.en-US: An X.com account monitoring skill for OpenClaw, built to track activity and important signals.

desc.zh-CN: 连接 ComfyUI 工作流的技能项目，给 Agent 加上图像生成与自动化能力。
desc.en-US: A skill project that connects ComfyUI workflows, adding image generation and automation capabilities to an agent.

desc.zh-CN: JavaScript 知识棱镜 CLI 工具，把知识处理做成可组合、可扩展的命令行工作流。
desc.en-US: A JavaScript knowledge prism CLI toolkit that turns knowledge processing into a composable, extensible workflow.

desc.zh-CN: 用于采集、整理和沉淀信息的知识收集项目，偏向知识入口与素材汇聚。
desc.en-US: A knowledge collection project for gathering, organizing, and preserving information, focused on intake and aggregation.

desc.zh-CN: 以 flomo 为核心的知识管理工具，兼具 MCP Client 与 MCP Server 角色，强化笔记洞察、整理与写作。
desc.en-US: A flomo-centered knowledge tool that acts as both an MCP client and MCP server, enhancing note insights, organization, and writing.

desc.zh-CN: 围绕记忆与上下文管理展开的实验项目，关注长期信息保留和调用方式。
desc.en-US: An experimental project around memory and context management, focused on long-term information retention and retrieval.

desc.zh-CN: 面向 AI Agent 的浏览器扩展项目，让 Agent 拥有更直接的网页交互能力。
desc.en-US: A browser extension project for AI agents, giving them a more direct way to interact with the web.

desc.zh-CN: 围绕 EvoMap Darwin 的实验性项目，用来承载概念验证、原型实现与迭代探索。
desc.en-US: An experimental EvoMap Darwin project used for proofs of concept, prototypes, and iterative exploration.

desc.zh-CN: 围绕 VI System 的系统化实践项目，偏向方法论落地与结构化表达。
desc.en-US: A systematic practice project around the VI System, focused on turning methodology into structured implementation.
